stages.description: Research funding only for Family A techniques under pre-registered, multi-site, replication-protocol-bound studies. No pilot deployment authority.
stages.continuation_gate: Continuation gate at 36-60 months: pre-registered replication outcomes meet pre-declared effect-size threshold.

stages.description: Controlled efficacy trials in test plots if A1 gate cleared. Comparative trials against established alternatives.
stages.continuation_gate: Continuation gate at 60-96 months: comparative effect sizes non-inferior or superior to established alternatives.

stages.description: Protocol specification required for Family B techniques before any authorization.
stages.continuation_gate: Continuation gate: specific protocols submitted and independently reviewed for mechanism plausibility.

stages.description: Refuse research funding for Family C techniques.
stages.continuation_gate: Continuation gate for moratorium lift: peer-reviewed publication of a falsifiable mechanism by an independent group.

stages.description: Parallel mandatory track — comparable public funding for established drought-resilience interventions.
stages.continuation_gate: Continuation gate at 60 months: comparative resilience metrics across electroculture vs. established-pathway pilots.
